text: Apple reported record Q4 revenue of $94.9B, beating analyst estimates of $89B driven by strong iPhone 15 demand.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Revenue beat estimates by ~6.6% with clear product-driven catalyst.

text: Tesla shares dropped 9% after Q3 deliveries missed Wall Street expectations and margins compressed for the third straight quarter.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Missed deliveries plus three-quarter margin compression — both unambiguously bearish.

text: The Federal Reserve held rates steady at 5.25-5.50% as expected, signaling a data-dependent stance going forward.
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: Decision matched consensus with no new guidance — limited directional information.

text: Nvidia announced a $50B share buyback program alongside guidance for 20% YoY data center growth in 2026.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Large buyback plus strong forward guidance both support upside.

text: Boeing announced an additional $1.5B charge on its 777X program due to certification delays extending into 2027.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Material new charge with timeline slippage — clear cost and execution headwind.

text: 比亚迪 11 月新能源汽车销量 50.6 万辆，同比增长 31%，连续多月刷新历史纪录。
label: POSITIVE
rationale: 销量同比强劲增长且创新高，基本面持续向好。

text: 中芯国际 Q3 财报营收基本符合预期，但毛利率环比下滑 3 个百分点，主要因折旧增加。
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: 毛利率下滑反映成本压力，盈利质量走弱。

text: 央行公开市场操作连续三日等量续作 MLF，市场流动性维持中性偏松。
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: 等量续作属常规操作，未释放明显宽松或收紧信号。

text: Microsoft Azure cloud revenue grew 29% YoY, the fastest pace in eight quarters, driven by AI workloads.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Accelerating top-line growth with a clear secular driver (AI).

text: Meta announced job cuts of 5% as part of efficiency drive, while reiterating 2026 capex guidance of $40B.
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: Layoffs are bearish but capex reiteration offsets — net effect roughly balanced.

text: Goldman Sachs cut its US GDP growth forecast for 2026 from 2.1% to 1.8% citing tariff uncertainty.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Macro forecast downgrade with named risk factor.

text: PDD reported revenue of 99.4B RMB, up 44% YoY but missing the 102B consensus.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Top-line miss despite high absolute growth — market reacts to deltas vs consensus.

text: AMD unveiled MI350 AI accelerator with 35% higher inference throughput than the prior generation.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Competitive product launch addressing the highest-growth segment.

text: 宁德时代发布麒麟二代电池，能量密度 255Wh/kg，预计 2026 年底量产。
label: POSITIVE
rationale: 技术突破且有明确量产时间表。

text: Berkshire Hathaway disclosed it trimmed its Apple stake by 13% in Q3 13F filing.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Marquee long-term holder reducing position is a bearish signal.

text: Pfizer's experimental obesity pill failed primary endpoint in Phase 2 trial; company will not advance to Phase 3.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Trial failure terminating program — clear pipeline setback.

text: Disney+ added 12.5 million subscribers in Q4, exceeding guidance and reducing streaming losses by 60%.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Subscriber beat plus material loss reduction.

text: Crude oil settled flat near $78/bbl as OPEC+ extended output cuts but demand worries persisted.
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: Offsetting bullish supply and bearish demand factors leave price unchanged.

text: Salesforce raised FY26 revenue guidance midpoint by $200M, citing strong agentic AI product traction.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Forward guidance raise with named product driver.

text: JPMorgan flagged rising credit card delinquencies among subprime borrowers as a key 2026 watch item.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Credit deterioration in a leading-indicator segment.

text: 贵州茅台 2026 年经销商大会确认全年增长目标 9-10%，与年初指引一致。
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: 目标维持不变，未提供新增量信息。

text: Intel Foundry secured Microsoft as a major customer for its 18A node, expected to ramp in 2H 2026.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Anchor customer win validates foundry strategy.

text: Adobe reported strong Q3 but provided Q4 revenue guidance below consensus, citing slower enterprise deals.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Backward-looking beat overshadowed by forward-looking guide-down.

text: 10-year US Treasury yield closed unchanged at 4.32% ahead of next week's CPI release.
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: Range-bound action ahead of a key data print — no directional commitment.

text: Shopify Q3 revenue grew 26% YoY with operating margins expanding 400bps; merchant solutions led growth.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Growth plus margin expansion — high-quality beat.
